name: git-branches-panel
description: Tree view for branches, tags, stashes, worktrees, hooks, and remotes across one or multiple Git repositories with grouping, search, filtering, compare/history workflows, remote-host integration, worktree maintenance, sync state, and quick actions.

commands.title: New Branch from Selected Branch and Checkout...
Show Stashed Changes vs Current Branch
Prune Local Branches with Missing Upstream

gitBranchesPanel.groupByFolder.description: Group branches by folder prefix (for example, feature/my-branch goes into the feature folder).

gitBranchesPanel.normalizeNewBranchNames.description: Apply extra lowercase kebab-case normalization to new branch names after the extension first sanitizes them into valid Git branch names, stripping special characters other than `-` while preserving folder separators (`/`).

gitBranchesPanel.newBranchPrefixes.description: Optional branch-name prefixes to offer before the new branch input opens. Use an empty array to skip the prefix picker.

gitBranchesPanel.protectedBranchNames.description: Branch names to protect from delete actions. Remote branches also honor the short branch name, so `main` protects `origin/main`.

gitBranchesPanel.branchContextMenu.prima.description: Ordered list of branch right-click actions to show before 'More Branch Actions...'. Remove action ids to hide them; the full fallback menu always remains available from 'More Branch Actions...'.

gitBranchesPanel.branchContextMenu.showR.description: Show 'Rebase Current onto Selected' directly in the branch context menu instead of only inside More Branch Actions...
Show 'Rebase Selected onto Current' directly in the branch context menu for local non-current branches.

gitBranchesPanel.branchContextMenu.showS.description: Show 'Squash Merge into Current' directly in the branch context menu.

gitBranchesPanel.branchContextMenu.showR.description: Show 'Reset Current to Selected...' directly in the branch context menu.

gitBranchesPanel.branchContextMenu.showF.description: Show 'Force Push with Lease' directly in the branch context menu for tracked local branches.

gitBranchesPanel.sortOrder.description: Sort branches alphabetically or by most recently updated commit.

gitBranchesPanel.tagSortOrder.description: Sort tags by newest version first, oldest version first, alphabetically, or by most recently updated commit. Version-aware sorting recognizes semver-like suffixes such as `v1.2.3` or `release/v1.2.3` and keeps non-version tags in name order after version tags.

gitBranchesPanel.multiRepository.mode.description: Control how repositories are shown in the tree: keep the old flat view when only one repository is open (`auto`), always wrap sections under repository containers (`alwaysGroupByRepository`), or show only the active repository (`singleActiveRepository`).

gitBranchesPanel.multiRepository.followA.description: When enabled, keep the active repository aligned with the Git repository that owns the active editor whenever multi-repository support is in use.

gitBranchesPanel.sections.local.visible.description: Show the Local section in the tree. Commands can still resolve the current branch even when this section is hidden.

gitBranchesPanel.sections.remote.visible.description: Show the Remote section with remote-tracking branches.

gitBranchesPanel.sections.remotes.visibl.description: Show the dedicated Remotes section with fetch, URL, rename, and remove actions for configured remotes.

gitBranchesPanel.sections.stash.visible.description: Show the Stash section in the tree.

gitBranchesPanel.sections.worktree.visib.description: Show the Worktree section in the tree.

gitBranchesPanel.sections.hooks.visible.description: Show the Hooks section when the repository has configured hooks.

gitBranchesPanel.sections.tags.visible.description: Show the Tags section in the tree.

gitBranchesPanel.tags.defaultType.description: Default tag type to preselect in the Create Tag workflow.

gitBranchesPanel.tags.pushAfterCreate.description: After creating a tag, immediately prompt for a remote and push that specific tag.

gitBranchesPanel.tags.requireMessageForA.description: Require a non-empty annotation message for annotated and signed annotated tags. When disabled, leaving the message blank reuses the tag name as the annotation subject.

gitBranchesPanel.search.includeHooks.description: Include Git hook items in the Find Ref command results.

gitBranchesPanel.search.maxResults.description: Maximum number of Find Ref results to show after ranking matches.

gitBranchesPanel.search.autoLoadAllSecti.description: Load all searchable sections before running Find Ref or applying tree filters so results include refs from collapsed sections.

gitBranchesPanel.remoteHosting.preferred.description: Prefer this remote when building branch, compare, and pull-request URLs for local branches that do not already imply a remote through their upstream or remote-tracking metadata.

gitBranchesPanel.remoteHosting.compareBa.description: Choose how browser compare and pull-request URLs resolve their base branch: the remote default branch, the selected branch's configured upstream branch, or the repository's currently checked out branch.

gitBranchesPanel.remoteHosting.customPro.description: Optional custom remote-host URL templates. Each entry can define `name`, `hostPattern`, `branchUrlTemplate`, `compareUrlTemplate`, and `pullRequestUrlTemplate` with placeholders like `${hostRoot}`, `${namespace}`, `${repo}`, `${branch}`, `${base}`, `${organization}`, `${project}`, and `${remoteName}`.

gitBranchesPanel.history.maxCommits.description: Maximum number of commits to load when showing branch or ref history in a quick pick.

gitBranchesPanel.history.includeMerges.description: Include merge commits in branch and ref history quick picks.

gitBranchesPanel.advanced.enableForcePus.description: Enable Force Push with Lease in advanced branch operation pickers and command menus.

gitBranchesPanel.advanced.defaultResetMo.description: Default reset mode to preselect when resetting the current branch to another ref.

gitBranchesPanel.advanced.allowNonCurren.description: Allow rebasing a selected non-current local branch onto the current branch through a temporary worktree.

gitBranchesPanel.advanced.rebaseAutostas.description: Prefer Git's --autostash behavior when rebasing the current branch and the working tree is dirty.

gitBranchesPanel.showCurrentBranchInfo.description: Show the current branch summary above the branches tree views.

gitBranchesPanel.toolbar.singleRepositor.description: Ordered list of extension quick actions to show in the view toolbar when only one repository is open. Remove action ids to hide them and reorder the list to change the toolbar order.

gitBranchesPanel.toolbar.multiRepository.description: Ordered list of extension quick actions to show in the view toolbar when multiple repositories are open. Actions automatically adapt between active-repository and grouped all-repositories commands when needed.

gitBranchesPanel.showStatusBarBranchActi.description: Deprecated. This setting no longer has any effect because the extension no longer contributes a status bar branch action.
gitBranchesPanel.showStatusBarBranchActi.deprecationMessage: Deprecated: the status bar branch action was removed in 1.6.0 because VS Code already shows the active branch. This setting no longer has any effect.

gitBranchesPanel.toolbar.showNewBranch.description: Show the New Branch quick action in the view toolbar.

gitBranchesPanel.toolbar.showStashSilent.description: Show the Stash all changes silently quick action in the extension Branches view toolbar.

gitBranchesPanel.changesView.showStashAl.description: Show the Stash all changes silently quick action in the built-in Changes view title bar.

gitBranchesPanel.changesView.showStashSt.description: Show the Stash staged changes silently quick action in the built-in Changes view title bar.

gitBranchesPanel.changesView.showStashAl.description: Show the Stash all changes quick action in the built-in Changes view title bar.

gitBranchesPanel.changesView.showStashSt.description: Show the Stash staged changes quick action in the built-in Changes view title bar.

gitBranchesPanel.toolbar.showCurrentBran.description: Show the Sync Current Branch or Publish Current Branch quick action in the view toolbar. In grouped multi-repository mode, this slot becomes Sync All Repositories Branches.

gitBranchesPanel.toolbar.showFetchAll.description: Show the Fetch All quick action in the view toolbar. In grouped multi-repository mode, this slot becomes Fetch All Repositories.

gitBranchesPanel.toolbar.showFetchAllPru.description: Show the Fetch All (Prune) quick action in the view toolbar. In grouped multi-repository mode, this slot becomes Fetch All Repositories (Prune).

gitBranchesPanel.toolbar.showPullAllRepo.description: Show the Pull All Branch Changes quick action in the view toolbar when multiple repositories are open. In grouped multi-repository mode, this slot becomes Pull All Repositories Changes.

gitBranchesPanel.toolbar.showRefresh.description: Show the Refresh quick action in the view toolbar.

gitBranchesPanel.toolbar.showAdvancedAct.description: Show the More Actions quick action in the view toolbar.

gitBranchesPanel.toolbar.showSettings.description: Show the Open Extension Settings quick action in the view toolbar.
